ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: The response is contextually relevant and maintains persona consistency but lacks a bit of naturalness in phrasing. Overall quality remains good, though could be smoother for better flow.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>Short note: Lacks context relevance and persona consistency with the character of Inspector Lestrade but is natural in tone, which somewhat compensates for its overall quality.

A well-balanced response maintaining persona, relevance to context and naturalness in dialogue with a slight room for improvement on overall quality by providing more specific guidance or information.
